A statement piece that bridges streetwear and high fashion, this oversize denim jacket commands attention with its relaxed, exaggerated silhouette and unmistakable allover diagonal logo print. Rendered in a classic light-wash blue, the piece delivers an effortlessly cool aesthetic rooted in the house's signature approach to proportion and detail. Chest flap pockets and side welt pockets complete the utilitarian-luxe finish, making it as functional as it is striking. 100% cotton denim Allover diagonal logo print Button front closure Chest flap pockets; side welt pockets Light blue wash Season: SS24 773616TPW534868. text: Twill Vest. This refined twill vest merges a minimalist silhouette with a sleek zip front closure, making it an effortless cornerstone of any elevated wardrobe.
